author: raoatifshad
body:
#### PR description:
PR title:

This PR addresses clang static analyzer thread-safety warnings in `Alignment/OfflineValidation/macros/makeArrowPlots.C`.

The macro previously used mutable file-scope global variables as ROOT `TTree` branch buffers and for output directory storage:

```cpp
float y_, x_, z_, phi_, r_, dphi_, dr_, dx_, dz_, dy_;
int level_, sublevel_;
char outputDir_[292];
```

This PR replaces these globals with a local `ArrowPlotBranches` structure instantiated inside `makeArrowPlots()` and passed explicitly to the helper plotting functions.

The branch names, selections, cuts, scale factors, plot names, output file names, and plotting logic remain unchanged. The modification only changes the storage location of the branch buffers from file-scope globals to local state.

This removes the `threadsafety.GlobalStatic` and `cms.FunctionChecker` warnings originating from `makeArrowPlots.C` while preserving the existing behaviour of the macro.

Warnings addressed:

* `threadsafety.GlobalStatic`
* `cms.FunctionChecker`

Since this changes the implementation pattern used by the macro, I would appreciate feedback from the package experts on whether this approach is considered appropriate for this code or if another solution would be preferred.
title: [WarningFix]: Remove mutable global state from makeArroPlots
